topic: The psychology of gaslighting and how to spot it

scenes.narration: Someone can rewrite your reality without you ever noticing. You will doubt your memory, your senses, your sanity. And they will smile while doing it.
scenes.image_prompt: Black and white film noir, a cracked mirror reflecting a distorted empty room, heavy shadows, high contrast, cinematic

scenes.narration: It starts small. A denied conversation. A misremembered date. They insist you are wrong with such calm certainty that you begin to wonder if you are.
scenes.image_prompt: Black and white film noir, a single flickering candle casting long shadows on a bare wall, vintage moody atmosphere

scenes.narration: Gaslighters rarely raise their voices. They do not need to. Their weapon is patience. Their ammunition is your trust in yourself.
scenes.image_prompt: Black and white film noir, an empty chair under a dim hanging bulb in a dark empty room, heavy grain, cinematic

scenes.narration: You start apologizing for things you did not do. You explain yourself constantly. You keep receipts, just to prove you exist.
scenes.image_prompt: Black and white film noir, scattered torn paper notes on a wooden desk, a broken pen, harsh shadows, vintage

scenes.narration: Research on coercive control shows the goal is never agreement. It is dependence. If they define reality, they define you.
scenes.image_prompt: Black and white film noir, heavy rusted chains coiled on a stone floor, single beam of light, dramatic high contrast

scenes.narration: Watch their hands, not their words. A gaslighter punishes clarity. The moment you remember accurately, they change the subject or attack your character.
scenes.image_prompt: Black and white film noir, a gloved hand gripping the edge of a wooden table, shadow looming across the wall, noir lighting

scenes.narration: The way out begins the moment you stop arguing about what happened. You do not need them to agree. You only need to believe yourself.
scenes.image_prompt: Black and white film noir, a heavy wooden door slightly ajar with light spilling through the crack, fog, cinematic

scenes.narration: If someone must distort you to keep you, they were never keeping you. They were containing you. And you were never the one losing your mind.
scenes.image_prompt: Black and white film noir, a broken birdcage on an abandoned floor with the door wide open, soft rays of light, dramatic shadows
